name: Everyone Feeds It Whether They Mean To
text:
If a player would roll a die, flip a coin, or vote, instead they do that and you put a sludge counter on a creature you control AND that player puts a sludge counter on a creature you control. (Yes, twice. The town's chaos feeds it coming and going.)
{R}{G}, Sacrifice Everyone Feeds It Whether They Mean To: Each opponent loses life equal to the most sludge counters on a creature you control.
flavorText: The PSA said "do not feed the reservoir." Reading the PSA out loud counted as feeding it.
